channel.title: Shelby AI Deals
channel.description: Honest AI tool reviews for creators, freelancers, and small teams.

item.title: Grammarly Review 2026: More Than a Spell Checker for Professional Writers
item.description: Our Grammarly review examines its capabilities beyond basic spell checking, revealing why it's a top choice for professional writers seeking grammar, clarity, and tone assistance.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Otter.ai Review 2026: Best AI Meeting Notes for Freelancers & Small Teams
item.description: Our Otter.ai review explores how this AI-powered tool excels in creating accurate meeting notes, making it a top choice for freelancers and small teams.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Runway ML Review 2026: AI Video Editing for Creators Who Aren't Editors
item.description: Our Runway ML review explores its AI video editing capabilities for creators who aren't video pros, evaluating its features, pricing, and competition in 2026.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: SEMrush Review 2026: Is the Price Tag Justified for Small Teams?
item.description: Our SEMrush review for small business reveals whether the premium pricing is worth it for small teams and freelancers in 2026.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Synthesia Review 2026: AI Video Without a Camera (Is It Actually Good?)
item.description: In this Synthesia review, we dissect whether this AI video generator lives up to expectations for creating training and marketing content without cameras or actors.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: ChatGPT vs Jasper vs Claude for Content Writing: Honest Comparison
item.description: Comparing ChatGPT, Jasper AI, and Claude for writing reveals strengths in different scenarios. From ease of use to pricing, this analysis covers all aspects of AI writing tools.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Descript vs Riverside vs CapCut: Best AI Video Editor for Creators
item.description: In the battle of Descript vs Riverside vs CapCut, creators are seeking the best AI video editor for diverse needs. We compare these tools to identify strengths across different scenarios.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Grammarly vs ProWritingAid vs Hemingway: Best AI Editor for Freelance Writers
item.description: In this comparison of Grammarly, ProWritingAid, and Hemingway, we evaluate which AI editor offers the best tools for freelance writers, focusing on output quality, pricing, and ease of use.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Midjourney vs DALL-E vs Leonardo AI: Best AI Image Generator for Marketers
item.description: In the battle of Midjourney vs DALL-E vs Leonardo AI, we explore which AI image generator offers the best features for marketers. From pricing to ease of use, we cover all angles.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Notion AI vs ClickUp AI vs Monday AI: Best AI Project Management for Small Teams
item.description: Explore the strengths and weaknesses of Notion AI, ClickUp AI, and Monday AI to find the best AI project management tool for small teams. We compare features, ease of use, and pricing to help you decide.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Otter.ai vs Fireflies vs Fathom: Best AI Meeting Assistant
item.description: In the battle of Otter vs Fireflies vs Fathom, we compare these AI tools to help you choose the best AI meeting notes tool for your needs, covering features, pricing, and more.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Surfer SEO vs Clearscope vs Frase: Best Content Optimizer for Small Teams
item.description: In this comprehensive comparison of Surfer SEO, Clearscope, and Frase, we evaluate which content optimization tool offers the best features, ease of use, and value for small teams.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Writesonic vs Rytr vs Koala: Best Budget AI Writer Under $20/mo
item.description: In the battle of Writesonic vs Rytr vs Koala, we compare these budget AI writing tools to find the best option under $20/mo. Discover which tool excels in output quality, features, and pricing value.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Zapier vs Make.com: Which Automation Tool Saves More Time (and Money)?
item.description: Zapier vs Make.com — we compare pricing, integrations, ease of use, and real-world workflow performance. See which automation tool wins for freelancers, small teams, and complex workflows.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Best AI Automation Tools for Non-Technical Founders
item.description: Discover the best AI automation tools for non-technical founders in our comprehensive roundup. We evaluated 7 top tools based on output quality, ease of use, and value for money.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Best AI Design Tools for Non-Designers (Social Media, Ads, Decks)
item.description: Discover the best AI design tools for non-designers, focusing on social media, ads, and decks. We evaluated over 10 tools and ranked the top 6 based on user-friendliness, features, and pricing.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Best AI SEO Tools in 2026: Tested for Small Sites
item.description: Discover the 6 best AI SEO tools in 2026, carefully ranked based on output quality, value, and ease of use. Includes a top free option for transparency.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: 5 Best AI Tools for Small Marketing Teams in 2026
item.description: Discover the 5 best AI tools for marketing teams in 2026, chosen from a careful analysis of over 20 options. Our list includes tools with top-notch features, value, and ease of use, plus one non-affiliate choice for transparency.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Best AI Tools for Real Estate Agents: Content, Listings & Follow-Up
item.description: Discover the best AI tools real estate agents can use in 2026 to enhance content creation, streamline listings, and improve follow-up. We evaluated 10 tools, and 6 made the final list based on key criteria like output quality and value for money.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.description: Discover the best AI video tools for creators with no editing skills required. We've evaluated 6 top tools based on ease of use, output quality, and value for money.

item.title: Best Free AI Tools for Solopreneurs (That Are Actually Useful)
item.description: Explore the best free AI tools for solopreneurs in 2026, ranked by output quality, ease of use, and value. Discover five tools that truly stand out.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: How to Create an AI-Powered Client Onboarding System (For Freelancers)
item.description: Discover how to streamline and automate your client onboarding process using AI tools, making your freelance business more efficient and client-friendly.

item.title: How to Build a Complete AI Content Workflow (From Idea to Publish)
item.description: Discover how to streamline your ai content workflow, from brainstorming ideas to publishing polished articles, using top AI tools and strategies.

item.title: AI Tools for eCommerce Store Owners: Product Descriptions to Customer Service
item.description: Streamline your eCommerce operations from product descriptions to customer service using AI tools. Enhance efficiency and improve customer satisfaction by following our guide.

item.title: AI Tools for Freelance Copywriters: Stay Competitive Without Selling Out
item.description: Discover essential AI tools for copywriters to enhance productivity and creativity without compromising on quality.

item.description: Discover how using AI tools for podcasters can streamline your production workflow, from recording and editing to transcribing and repurposing content.

item.title: How to Automate Your Marketing with Zapier + AI (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Discover how to automate marketing with AI using Zapier, saving time and boosting efficiency in your marketing efforts.

item.title: How to Use AI for SEO: A Practical Guide for Beginners
item.description: Learn how to use AI for SEO to enhance your website's visibility with this beginner-friendly guide. Achieve higher rankings and streamline your content strategy efficiently.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: How to Repurpose One Blog Post Into 10 Pieces of Content Using AI
item.description: Learn how to repurpose content with AI to transform a single blog post into 10 different pieces of content, boosting your productivity and reach.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: How to Write a Blog Post With AI (Without It Reading Like AI)
item.description: Learn how to write a blog post with AI that feels human and authentic. This guide helps you craft engaging content using AI tools without losing your personal touch.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Pictory Review 2026: Turn Blog Posts Into Videos (Does It Actually Work?)
item.description: Pictory turns text into videos automatically using AI. We tested it with 20 real blog posts to see if the output is genuinely publish-worthy or just a gimmick.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Make.com Review 2026: The Best Automation Platform for Non-Developers?
item.description: Make.com (formerly Integromat) lets you build complex automations visually. We automated 15 real workflows over six weeks to test its limits and value.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Surfer SEO Review 2026: The Content Optimization Tool Freelancers Actually Need
item.description: We used Surfer SEO to optimize 20 articles over 90 days. Here is whether the $89/mo price tag is justified for freelancers and small content sites.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Descript Review 2026: Can It Replace Your Entire Video Editing Suite?
item.description: Descript promises text-based video editing that anyone can use. We spent 45 days editing real client projects to find out if it truly delivers.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Writesonic Review 2026: Best Budget AI Writer for Small Teams?
item.description: At $16/mo, Writesonic is one of the cheapest serious AI writers. We tested it for 30 days on real content to find out if budget pricing means budget quality.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Jasper vs Copy.ai: Which AI Writer Actually Delivers? (2026 Test)
item.description: We tested Jasper and Copy.ai on the exact same briefs — ads, blog posts, emails, and sales copy. Here is who wins and when each tool is better.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: 7 Best AI Writing Tools for Freelancers in 2026 (Tested & Ranked)
item.description: We tested 12 AI writing tools and narrowed it down to 7 that actually deliver value for freelancers. Ranked by output quality, price, and real-world usability.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Copy.ai Review 2026: Can It Replace a Freelance Copywriter?
item.description: We tested Copy.ai on real client work — ads, emails, blog posts, and sales pages. Here is whether it can actually replace hiring a freelance copywriter.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: Jasper AI Review 2026: Is It Still Worth It for Content Creators?
item.description: We spent 30 days testing Jasper AI on real content projects. Here is our honest take on pricing, output quality, and whether it is worth it in 2026.
item.author: ShelbyAI Team

item.title: The Solopreneur AI Stack: Every Tool You Need for Under $100/mo
item.description: The complete AI tool stack for solopreneurs — writing, design, automation, SEO, and productivity — all tested and selected for under $100 per month.
